prestazioni: M Performance N55B30M0 (3.0L I6) Stage 2+ ECU flash via MHD Tuning with custom ethanol (E85) mapping, targeting 420whp/480wtq on 22psi with a Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbo (82mm compressor, 62mm turbine) paired with a VRSF 7.5" race intercooler and custom 3.5" turbo-back exhaust featuring a MagnaFlow 304 stainless steel muffler delete section

Full bolt-on supporting mods: VRSF ChargePipe (aluminum, 3.5" diameter), Fuel-It Stage 3 LPFP (380lph) with ethanol sensor, NGK 97506 Iridium IX spark plugs gapped at 0.022", and a CSF N55-specific aluminum radiator with dual 14" SPAL fans for E85 cooling demands

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (F30-specific valving, 20-way adjustable compression/rebound), MCS 2-way adjustable rear camber arms, and Hotchkis Sport Suspension sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) to eliminate N55 torque steer under boost
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (F30-specific, 30mm front/40mm rear fender flares) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, paired with a Vorsteiner V-FF102 aggressive front lip and a custom 3D-printed rear diffuser (ABS plastic, matte black) to house dual 4" exhaust tips

CSF carbon fiber M Performance-style kidney grilles (gloss black) and a custom 3M Satin Space Gray vinyl wrap with matte black accents on the roof, mirrors, and side skirts, complemented by OEM+ M Performance carbon fiber side blades and a custom LED angel eye delete (Lux H8 V4 6000K bulbs)

Interior: Recaro SPG XL seats (F30-specific mounting brackets) upholstered in Alcantara with red contrast stitching, M Performance steering wheel (Nappa leather, flat-bottom), and a custom roll cage (6-point, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly) painted in BMW Individual Frozen Gray with red accent stripes
